title: Hand Minecart
description: Put yourself in a 3D Minecart in your hand (with hold my items )
body:
## Enjoy yourself inside The Minecart in your hand with Hand Minecraft!
![IHM (Banner)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01b71d2263833ae97832a3cc1dfd2c2434f1f1a0_0.webp)
#
# ![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d9be18fa81554995599ede5dbccf442f174fcab.png) Overview:
Change the shape of the minecart to a better and more beautiful shape that appears in your hand in a nice way and is consistent with every minecart . Also, you can put your skin with ease.
#

<details>
<summary>How does it work?</summary>
